Please scroll through the below contacts to find the relevant department Regional Big Issue Support Service offices for vendor support and queries England London & South East London & South East 113-115 Fonthill Road, London, N4 3HH +44 (0)20 7526 3445 Bristol & Bath Bristol & Bath 1 York Court Upper York Street Bristol BS2 8QF +44(0)117 9428538 South West South West 51-53 Poole Hill, Bournemouth, Dorset, BH2 5PW +44 (0)1202 314 261 North East North East 134 Front Street, Chester le Street, Co Durham DH3 3AY +44 (0)7961 987643 East Anglia East Anglia The Pottergate ARC, 28 Pottergate, Norwich, NR2 1DX +44 (0)1603 613 865 East Midlands & Oxford East Midlands & Oxford 99 Derby Road Nottingham, NG1 5BB tel:+44 (0)115 9598711 Birmingham & West Midlands Birmingham & West Midlands 14 Talbot House, Digbeth, B5 6BH +44(0)121 236 1936 Scotland & Wales Glasgow Glasgow 43 Bath Street, Glasgow, G2 1HW +44 (0)141 352 7274 Edinburgh Edinburgh 98 Commercial Street, Edinburgh, EH6 6LX 0131 225 6714 Wales Wales Hastings House, Fitzalan Place, Cardiff, CF24 OBL +44 (0)2920 255 670 Big Issue sellers in Yorkshire, Lancashire, Merseyside, Greater Manchester, Cumbria and Cheshire are run by a different franchise of the magazine, The Big Issue in the North. Details of how to contact them can be found here . Head Office (General Enquiries) 113-115 Fonthill Road, Finsbury Park, London, N4 3HH Or please call +44 (0)20 7526 3200 Become a Big Issue Vendor or give Vendor feedback To give feedback or make a complaint about a Big Issue Vendor, call 0121 230 1555 or email vendor.comments@bigissue.com If you want to become a vendor please contact Vendor.Support@Bigissue.com Editorial The Big Issue, 43 Bath Street, Glasgow, G2 1HW Email editorial@bigissue.com For advertising see below Subscriptions Customer Services 3 Queensbridge, The Lakes, Northampton, NN4 7BF Contact our subscription bureau on 01604 267 468 or email service@subs.bigissue.com . Advertising Enquiries Align your brand with a trusted, heritage brand, and offers unique access to a desirable audience. Recruitment advertising – tim.deeks@canopymedia.co.uk Big Issue Shop To sell with us or enquire about a Shop item, email us at enquiries@bigissueshop.com . Big Issue Invest If you have any questions about Big Issue Invest or require any support and guidance, please do not hesitate to get in touch with our team at investmentenquiries@bigissueinvest.com Big Issue Recruit If you have any questions about Big Issue Recruit or require any support and guidance, please do not hesitate to get in touch with our team at jobs@bigissue.com The Big Exchange Our mission is to build a new financial system in the UK that addresses some of the world’s biggest challenges. For any Big Exchange queries contact us here: Email enquiries@bigexchange.com or use the form here . Press Office Our office hours are Monday to Friday 9am 5pm.
